{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/limestone.png
|block_health=27.5
|block_resistance=1
|durability=50
|mass_damage=1.0
|hardness_damage=3.4
|swing_speed=2.6
|tags=stone, limestone
|modifiers=good_at
}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Stone]]
